toc-0.title: Introduction
toc-0.summary: The section introduces GPT-4, a model that can work with images and text to generate text. GPT-4 performs very well on tests designed for humans, like the bar exam, where it scores in the top 10%. It also outperforms previous models and state-of-the-art systems on language benchmarks. GPT-4 is better in multiple languages compared to models trained specifically for English. The report discusses how the infrastructure and methods used to build GPT-4 are scalable and predictable. However, GPT-4 still has limitations, such as being prone to errors and having a limited context memory.
